title: Suki Gifts International Yomiko Sitting Dog, Small, Dalmation
features: Suki Classics are the most realistic animal creations at affordable prices in a true celebration of Nature's workmanship. Collect them all!
description: Product Description Super soft plush small Dalmation toy from Suki Gifts International’s Classics Dog collection. Premium quality soft boa plush dog with realistic features, soft fur and airbrushed details. Measures at around 5 inches (12.7 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the Classics range of sitting and lying Cats, Dogs and Jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys. Safety Warning Please remove all hangtags and their fasteners before giving this product to a child. Box Contains 1 x Yomiko Small Sitting Dog Dalmation See more
